ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "author_type" TEXT /* Type of author (e.g., faculty, student, researcher) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or description of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the author */,
  "personal_website" TEXT /* Personal website of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed identifier for the publication */,
  "sortpubdate" TEXT /* Year of publication */,
  "fulljournalname" TEXT /* Journal title where the publication appeared */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author_list" TEXT /* List of authors who contributed to the publication */,
  "keyword_list" TEXT /* List of keywords associated with the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding sources for the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in press, submitted) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the publication */,
  "altmetric_score" REAL /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_fulljournalname FOREIGN KEY ("fulljournalname") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_list FOREIGN KEY ("author_list") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_funding_source FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_keyword_list FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_list") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with publications */,
  "keyword_category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword (e.g., discipline, methodology, topic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of journal (e.g., peer-reviewed, open access) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "cite_score" REAL /* CiteScore of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citing_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that is citing */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was recorded */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-citation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number associated with the funding source */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding source (e.g., government, private, institutional) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "research_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "research_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, image) */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_files_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication associated with the link */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., DOI, publisher's website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_links_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_keywords" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "keyword_id")
)
